name: Pudding & Pie Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl; mix well.
2. Transfer the mixture to a large, airtight container and label it as Pudding and Pie Mix.
3. Store the container in a cool, dry place and use within 6 to 8 months.
Makes about 9 cups of mix.
Variation: If you prefer cornstarch pudding and pie preparations, substitute 2 cups cornstarch for flour.
